title: small totem & shield
description: Tired of bulky items blocking your view? small totem & shield reduces the scale of Totems and Shields to give you a "Lower & Smaller" experience.
body:
# **small totem & shield**




![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b6dca86f5b6f35c17fc7551c10ee8f505abed9b.gif)


**Key Features:**

•  **Minimalist Combat Gear**: Totems and Shields are scaled down and lowered to ensure they never block your line of sight during PvP or survival.


•  **Performance Friendly**: Optimized textures that provide a visual upgrade without dropping your FPS.

•  **Universal Compatibility**: Works seamlessly with most versions of Minecraft.



**Why use this pack?**

Whether you are grinding in a survival world or fighting in a high-stakes PvP match, this pack removes the "clutter" from your screen while giving you a view worth looking at.



[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fd0146e51f5eaf863633c937f2f83fdcad42beb.png)](https://discord.gg/S8KBBVTQMn)



[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ab14eee4dc37ce0ad472c32046f32acb1cf9553.png)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCHIwhp5k4Zo0WS8QeiDhTJA)
